business.about: Modern HVAC contractors trusted by homeowners and property managers for installs, tune-ups, and emergency repair.

services.name: AC Installation
services.description: Complete central air installation including ductwork assessment, equipment, and commissioning.

services.name: Furnace Installation
services.description: High-efficiency gas or electric furnace installation with permit pull and haul-away.

services.name: Tune-Up & Maintenance
services.description: Seasonal tune-up: clean coils, check refrigerant, inspect electrical, test operation.

services.name: Emergency Repair
services.description: Same-day diagnosis and repair. Upfront pricing before work begins.

testimonials.name: Happy Customer
testimonials.text: Fast, honest, and got our AC running the same day.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Client
testimonials.text: Professional install — crew was clean and on time.

testimonials.name: Repeat Customer
testimonials.text: Best HVAC company we've used. Highly recommend.

process.title: Call or Book
process.description: Reach us 24/7. Emergency? We can usually be there today.

process.title: On-Site Diagnosis
process.description: Licensed tech inspects, explains the issue, and quotes before starting work.

process.title: Problem Solved
process.description: Repair or install complete. Satisfaction guaranteed, warrantied work.

chatbot.greeting: Hi — what HVAC issue can I help with today?
qualifyingQuestions: Is this for your home or business?
Is the system running at all, or is this an emergency?
